problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
